title: Upgrade DataTables Libraries to Latest Version
description:
Upgrade all jQuery DataTables libraries to the latest version to take advantage of new features, enhancements, bug fixes, and security patches. This is a maintenance task to keep the codebase up to date.

## Motivation
- Access new DataTables features and enhancements
- Apply security patches and bug fixes
- Maintain codebase currency for long-term supportability
acceptance_criteria: DataTables libraries upgraded to the latest stable version
All existing table functionality continues to work after upgrade
No visual regressions in table rendering
Dark mode table styling remains functional
Editor plugin (if upgraded) continues to work for inline editing
implementation_notes: Currently blocked. DataTables is used extensively across the application — upgrade requires comprehensive regression testing across all table views, dark mode, editor popups, and custom styling.
